channel.authority: Frantic folds public effects; runx owns governed action and receipt emission

bounty.title: Install runx on your platform and dogfood the core flows
bounty.description:
Install runx on your platform and dogfood the core flows

Install runx (npm install -g @runxhq/cli) and run the core flow on your named OS/platform: runx init, run a governed skill (runx skill ... --json), get a sealed receipt, runx verify it. This pays for FINDINGS, not a works-fine note. Core flow docs: runx.ai/start, runx.ai/docs/quickstart, runx.ai/docs/receipts.

Deliverable: A findings report from installing and running the core flow, naming OS/arch, the exact command sequence and versions, and every place it stuck, plus evidence.json with each step's command and captured output.

Acceptance:
- Names OS/arch and the exact install and command sequence with versions.
- Reports every place it stuck: command, expected vs observed, the doc URL that was wrong or unclear.
- evidence.json captures each step's command and output, including the receipt id and verify result.
- A clean run still includes captured outputs and timestamps.

events.text: #14 · Install runx on your platform and dogfood the core flows
